channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Officer involved in Henry Nowak case resigns after Starmer says he ‘felt sick’ watching bodycam footage
item.description: Politics latest: Officer involved in Henry Nowak case resigns after Starmer says he ‘felt sick’ watching bodycam footage

item.title: Independent UK Politics: In The Room | Mandelson files: 1,504 pointless pages?
item.description: In The Room | Mandelson files: 1,504 pointless pages?

item.title: BBC Politics: Henry Nowak arrest footage raises 'serious questions for police', PM says
item.description: Henry Nowak arrest footage raises 'serious questions for police', PM says

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
FT UK Politics: Kyle included ‘more positive language’ in AI speech after Mandelson advice
item.description: Kyle included ‘more positive language’ in AI speech after Mandelson advice

item.title: The Guardian: Streeting says raising concerns over Gaza in government like ‘hitting up against a brick wall’ - The Guardian
item.description: Streeting says raising concerns over Gaza in government like ‘hitting up against a brick wall’ - The Guardian

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: The biggest disclosure in the Mandelson files is that all the might of the British state could not get a lead time of less than 8-10 weeks for a goddamn *briefcase*.
t.co/M4BkyGVb4L
item.description:
The biggest disclosure in the Mandelson files is that all the might of the British state could not get a lead time of less than 8-10 weeks for a goddamn *briefcase*.
t.co/M4BkyGVb4L

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Online misogyny risks ‘lost generation of young men’, Sadiq Khan warns as he calls for under-16s social media ban
item.description: Online misogyny risks ‘lost generation of young men’, Sadiq Khan warns as he calls for under-16s social media ban

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer uses disappearing messages on his phone, No 10 confirms
item.description: Starmer uses disappearing messages on his phone, No 10 confirms

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham could introduce 10-year plan to nationalise ‘broken’ water industry
item.description: Andy Burnham could introduce 10-year plan to nationalise ‘broken’ water industry
